response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering with strong TypeScript and Node.js depth across multiple production-scale systems, and his current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development — a direct match to the job's AI agent requirement. His experience spans AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, React, and a demonstrated TDD culture evidenced by open-source testing libraries and community workshops. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js from his stated stack, no mention of Kotlin, and no explicit reference to Vitest or Playwright despite clear testing expertise.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across production environments at multiple Berlin-based companies
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure work at re:cinq directly matches the AI agent development requirement
Deep testing culture: authored open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), organized TDD workshops, and applied TDD/CI/CD professionally
concerns: Nest.js is entirely absent from the resume despite being the primary backend framework in the required stack
Kotlin (secondary stack requirement) is not mentioned; Java appears only in older, peripheral contexts (robotics tooling at Altom)
Vitest and Playwright are not named explicitly, leaving alignment with the specific listed testing frameworks unverified

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
